core_mechanism: path-integral (Feynman-Kac-type) representation of the one-parameter evolution semigroup generated by a second-order operator, obtained by averaging over an ensemble of paths, where the generator is a quadratic form in first-order flow-generators plus a linear drift term
brief_reason: The abstract builds a one-parameter group of operators via functional integration over spaces of paths whose infinitesimal generator is a quadratic form in the Lie derivatives along given flow directions plus a term linear in another generator, i.e. a propagator represented as an integral over paths.
